# rudderstack_account (Data Source)

Use this data source to read an existing RudderStack warehouse account by ID without
managing it as a Terraform-managed resource. Only non-secret attributes are exposed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "rudderstack_account" "example" {
  id = "acc_01HX..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the account to look up.

### Read-Only

- `definition_name` (String) The account definition name (e.g. SOURCE_BIGQUERY).
- `name` (String) Human readable name of the account.
- `options` (Map of String) Free-form non-secret options for the account, as key-value string pairs.
- `type` (String) The account definition type (e.g. bigquery).
